languages.text: {n}Вы слишком устали, чтобы произносить речи, чтобы беспокоиться о чем-либо вообще. Патент вернулся — и это главное. Вы чувствует себя опустошенным. Вам просто. Нужно. Отдохнуть.{/n}
{n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы слишком устали, чтобы произносить речи, чтобы беспокоиться о чем-либо вообще. Патент вернулся — и это главное. Вы чувствует себя опустошенным. Вам просто. Нужно. Отдохнуть.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, to worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

{n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你已筋疲力尽，根本无法发表演说，也无力再操心任何事。贸易授状夺回来了，这才是最重要的。你感觉整个人都被掏空了。现在的你，非常需要休息。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你已筋疲力尽，根本无法发表演说，也无力再操心任何事。贸易授状夺回来了，这才是最重要的。你感觉整个人都被掏空了。现在的你，非常需要休息。{/n}

languages.text: {n}No te quedan fuerzas para dar un discurso ni para pensar en nada. Has recuperado la Patente, eso es todo lo que importa. No puedes más. Necesitas... un descanso. Urgente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}No te quedan fuerzas para dar un discurso ni para pensar en nada. Has recuperado la Patente, eso es todo lo que importa. No puedes más. Necesitas... un descanso. Urgente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous êtes trop {mf|épuisé|épuisée} pour les discours, ou pour vous soucier de quoi que ce soit. La lettre de marque est de nouveau en votre possession, et c'est tout ce qui compte. Vous vous sentez vide. Tout ce qu'il vous faut, c'est... du repos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous êtes trop {mf|épuisé|épuisée} pour les discours, ou pour vous soucier de quoi que ce soit. La lettre de marque est de nouveau en votre possession, et c'est tout ce qui compte. Vous vous sentez vide. Tout ce qu'il vous faut, c'est... du repos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Konuşma yapamayacak veya herhangi bir şey için endişelenemeyecek kadar bitkinsin. Ruhsatname geri alındı, önemli olan da bu. Kendini boşlukta hissediyorsun. Sadece. Dinlenmen. Gerek.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Konuşma yapamayacak veya herhangi bir şey için endişelenemeyecek kadar bitkinsin. Ruhsatname geri alındı, önemli olan da bu. Kendini boşlukta hissediyorsun. Sadece. Dinlenmen. Gerek.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du bist zu erschöpft, um Reden zu schwingen oder dir Sorgen zu machen. Der Handelsbrief wurde geborgen. Nur das zählt. Du fühlst dich leer. Du musst dich. Einfach. Ausruhen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bist zu erschöpft, um Reden zu schwingen oder dir Sorgen zu machen. Der Handelsbrief wurde geborgen. Nur das zählt. Du fühlst dich leer. Du musst dich. Einfach. Ausruhen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}疲れて、演説もできないし、何も心配できない。証書は取り戻された。それが大事だ。ただ、虚しい。ただ、休む必要がある。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You are too exhausted to make speeches, nor worry about anything at all. The Warrant has been recovered, and that is what matters. You feel hollow. You simply. Need. To rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}疲れて、演説もできないし、何も心配できない。証書は取り戻された。それが大事だ。ただ、虚しい。ただ、休む必要がある。{/n}
